steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute fundamental indicators for COPEL at 2025-03-31
from decimal import Decimal

# Inputs from provided data (latest 2025-03-31 'ÚLTIMO')
assets = 60240753000.0  # Ativo Total
current_assets = 16146351000.0  # Ativo Circulante
cash = 6055823000.0  # Caixa e Equivalentes de Caixa
financial_apps = 2194000.0  # Aplicações Financeiras
inventories = 152931000.0
receivables = 6188907000.0
noncurrent_assets = 44094402000.0
patrimonio_liq = 26233526000.0

# Liabilities
current_liabilities = 10879856000.0
payables = 2367173000.0  # Fornecedores
short_loans = 2972270000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos (corrente)
other_curr_liab = 3955419000.0
noncurrent_loans = 15822773000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos (nao corrente)

# Debt (gross) = short_loans + noncurrent_loans
div_bruta = short_loans + noncurrent_loans

# Income statement: quarter and annual values
# Use accounts 3.01, 3.03, 3.05, 3.06, 3.07, 3.08, 3.09 etc
# Quarter Q1 2025 (ÚLTIMO in 2025-03-31 DFP)
q1_2025_revenue = 5892086000.0  # 3.01
q1_2025_cogs = -4410497000.0  # 3.02 (negative in table)
q1_2025_gross = 1481589000.0  # 3.03
q1_2025_oper = -100057000.0  # 3.04 (operating expenses net)
q1_2025_ebit = 1381532000.0  # 3.05
q1_2025_fin = -446525000.0  # 3.06
q1_2025_income_before_tax = 935007000.0  # 3.07
q1_2025_tax = -270340000.0  # 3.08
q1_2025_net = 664667000.0  # 3.11 or 4.01

# Quarter Q1 2024 (PENULTIMO in 2025-03-31 DFP corresponds to 2024-01-01 to 2024-03-31)
q1_2024_revenue = 5416998000.0
q1_2024_cogs = -4154264000.0
q1_2024_gross = 1262734000.0
q1_2024_oper = -227645000.0
q1_2024_ebit = 1035089000.0
q1_2024_fin = -268174000.0
q1_2024_income_before_tax = 766915000.0
q1_2024_tax = -234725000.0
q1_2024_net = 533543000.0

# Annual FY 2024 (ÚLTIMO in 2024-12 dataset corresponds to 2024 full year)
fy2024_revenue = 22651036000.0  # 3.01 in 2024-12 table
fy2024_gross = 4891244000.0  # 3.03
fy2024_ebit = 4064248000.0  # 3.05
fy2024_depreciation = -1465478000.0  # 7.04.01 (negative value in table)
fy2024_net = 2799370000.0  # 4.01
fy2024_depr_abs = abs(fy2024_depreciation)

# Annual FY 2023 (penultimo in 2024-12 table) - not needed directly except maybe for TTM calc method uses FY2024 + Q1 2025 - Q1 2024
# compute TTM (trailing twelve months) for revenue, EBIT, net income, gross profit, depreciation
revenue_ttm = fy2024_revenue + q1_2025_revenue - q1_2024_revenue
gross_ttm = fy2024_gross + q1_2025_gross - q1_2024_gross
ebit_ttm = fy2024_ebit + q1_2025_ebit - q1_2024_ebit
net_ttm = fy2024_net + q1_2025_net - q1_2024_net

# Depreciation TTM: use 7.04.01 annual 2024 and q1 values
q1_2025_depr = -355020000.0
q1_2024_depr = -364628000.0
depr_ttm = fy2024_depreciation + q1_2025_depr - q1_2024_depr
# EBITDA TTM = EBIT TTM + abs(depr_ttm)
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + abs(depr_ttm)

# Shares outstanding: from composition (use 2024-12 numbers as proxy)
total_shares_issued = 2982810591
total_shares_treasury = 5698400
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - total_shares_treasury

price = 11.18
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding

# EV = market_cap + div_bruta - cash_and_equivalents (use cash + financial apps?)
# Use 'Disponibilidades' as cash equivalents = cash + financial_apps
disponibilidades = cash + financial_apps

enterprise_value = market_cap + div_bruta - disponibilidades

# Per-share metrics
revenue_ttm_per_share = revenue_ttm / shares_outstanding
ebit_ttm_per_share = ebit_ttm / shares_outstanding
net_ttm_per_share = net_ttm / shares_outstanding
assets_per_share = assets / shares_outstanding
equity_per_share = patrimonio_liq / shares_outstanding
cap_giro = current_assets - current_liabilities
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares_outstanding
ativ_circ_liq = current_assets - disponibilidades  # chosen definition
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / shares_outstanding

# Ratios
lpa = net_ttm_per_share
vpa = equity_per_share
pl = price / lpa if lpa != 0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa != 0 else None
p_ebit = price / ebit_ttm_per_share if ebit_ttm_per_share != 0 else None
psr = price / revenue_ttm_per_share if revenue_ttm_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share != 0 else None
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share != 0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share != 0 else None

ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm != 0 else None
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm != 0 else None

# Margins (as percentages)
# Use Receita Líquida (12 months) = revenue_ttm
marg_bruta = (gross_ttm / revenue_ttm) * 100 if revenue_ttm != 0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_ttm / revenue_ttm) * 100 if revenue_ttm != 0 else None
marg_liquida = (net_ttm / revenue_ttm) * 100 if revenue_ttm != 0 else None

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_over_assets = (ebit_ttm / assets) * 100 if assets != 0 else None

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = assets - payables - cash
roic = (ebit_ttm / roic_denom) * 100 if roic_denom != 0 else None

# ROE = Net / Patrimonio
roe = (net_ttm / patrimonio_liq) * 100 if patrimonio_liq != 0 else None

# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities if current_liabilities != 0 else None

# Div Br / Patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq if patrimonio_liq != 0 else None

# Giro Ativos = Receita Líquida TTM / Ativo Total
giro_ativos = revenue_ttm / assets if assets != 0 else None

# 3-month indicators: use Q1 2025 quarter values (difference already provided)
revenue_3m = q1_2025_revenue
ebit_3m = q1_2025_ebit
net_3m = q1_2025_net

# LPA (12 months) already lpa. LPA 3 months per share:
lpa_3m = net_3m / shares_outstanding

# LPA per share numbers etc done.

# Prepare outputs rounding
from math import isfinite

def r(x, digits=2):
    if x is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(x, float):
        return round(x, digits)
    return x

output = {
    'Ativo': r(assets,2),
    'Disponibilidades': r(disponibilidades,2),
    'Ativo Circulante': r(current_assets,2),
    'Dív. Bruta': r(div_bruta,2),
    'Dív. Líquida': r(div_bruta - disponibilidades,2),
    'Patrim. Lq': r(patrimonio_liq,2) if False else None
}
# Note: fix key name for Patrim. Lq - wrong escape. We'll prepare final mapping differently.

results = {
    'Ativo': assets,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_bruta - disponibilidades,
    'Patrim. Líq': patrimonio_liq,
    'Receita Líquida (12 meses)': revenue_ttm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ttm,
    'Lucro Líquido (12 meses)': net_ttm,
    'Receita Líquida (3 meses)': revenue_3m,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_3m,
    'Lucro Líquido (3 meses)': net_3m,
    'P/L': r(pl,4) if pl is not None and isfinite(pl) else None,
    'P/VP': r(p_vp,4) if p_vp is not None and isfinite(p_vp) else None,
    'P/EBIT': r(p_ebit,4) if p_ebit is not None and isfinite(p_ebit) else None,
    'PSR': r(psr,4) if psr is not None and isfinite(psr) else None,
    'P/Ativos': r(p_ativos,4) if p_ativos is not None and isfinite(p_ativos) else None,
    'P/Cap. Giro': r(p_cap_giro,4) if p_cap_giro is not None and isfinite(p_cap_giro) else None,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': r(p_ativ_circ_liq,4) if p_ativ_circ_liq is not None and isfinite(p_ativ_circ_liq) else None,
    'EV / EBITDA': r(ev_ebitda,4) if ev_ebitda is not None and isfinite(ev_ebitda) else None,
    'EV / EBIT': r(ev_ebit,4) if ev_ebit is not None and isfinite(ev_ebit) else None,
    'LPA': r(lpa,6),
    'VPA': r(vpa,6),
    'Marg. Bruta': round(marg_bruta,2) if marg_bruta is not None else None,
    'Marg. EBIT': round(marg_ebit,2) if marg_ebit is not None else None,
    'Marg. Líquida': round(marg_liquida,2) if marg_liquida is not None else None,
    'EBIT / Ativo': round(ebit_over_assets,2) if ebit_over_assets is not None else None,
    'ROIC': round(roic,2) if roic is not None else None,
    'ROE': round(roe,2) if roe is not None else None,
    'Liquidez Corr': r(liquidez_corr,4) if liquidez_corr is not None else None,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': r(divbr_patrim,4) if divbr_patrim is not None else None,
    'Giro Ativos': r(giro_ativos,6) if giro_ativos is not None else None
}

# Print results nicely
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))

# Also return results dict for the caller
results
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
